name: opus-pack
description: Home of the Opus Pack plugin: distilled operating skills for daily-driver Claude models - few dense rules, executable gates over long prose, measured against their own doctrine with the nulls published.

plugins.name: opus-pack
plugins.description: Eight agent-discipline skills: operational-rigor, delegation-and-review, ground-truth-gates, cross-model-review, skill-authoring, security-architect, product-roadmap, personal-goal-planning. Hooks stay manual-install by design (per-user consent).
